subject: W1.T3 boot protocol update — embed 5-step skill boot sequence
body:
Per Roadmap V1 FINAL §3 W1.T3, update `docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/boot/AIER_CODE_BOOT_MINIMUM_V1.md` to embed the 5-step skill boot sequence from `SHARED/skills/SKILL_INVOCATION_PROTOCOL.md §1` so every Lane reads `SHARED/skills/INDEX.md` at turn-start before any task work. Boot Minimum updates are explicitly in `AMD_LANE01_CTO_AUTO_APPROVE_TECH_NON_CANON §3.1` YES list — Lane_01 self-approves. Also add a brief invocation note for the 4 W1.T2 DRAFT skills (with the DRAFT-consent caveat per SKILL_INVOCATION_PROTOCOL §5). Status of all 4 skills remains DRAFT — no ACTIVE promotion in this task. This handoff is the smoke-test product of `aier-dispatch` DRAFT v0.1 invocation in `LANE01-W1-T4-COMBINED-V1` Phase C.

Deliverables (LAW 16 order):
1. Snapshot — covered by parent task `LANE01-W1-T4-COMBINED-V1` snapshot
2. Edit `docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/boot/AIER_CODE_BOOT_MINIMUM_V1.md` — add new section after current §4 Read Order: §5 Skill Boot Sequence (5 steps from SKILL_INVOCATION_PROTOCOL §1)
3. Report covered by parent

Rollback: git revert the boot-protocol commit; original `AIER_CODE_BOOT_MINIMUM_V1.md` is preserved in git history.
requested_action: Lane_01 (CLAC-1) executor opens the boot file, appends the 5-step skill boot sequence section, commits, pushes; then aier-verify is invoked to validate the AC.
acceptance_criteria: Boot file contains a Step 1 instruction to read SHARED/skills/INDEX.md at turn-start
Boot file enumerates all 5 steps from SKILL_INVOCATION_PROTOCOL §1
Boot file references the DRAFT-consent caveat for invoking DRAFT skills
Boot file does NOT mark any DRAFT skill ACTIVE
Boot file does NOT modify SHARED/laws/* or CANON
Single commit with [vercel skip] suffix; pushed; HEAD matches origin/main; worktree clean
